column5: Nǐ hǎo, hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ.

column7: Reply with 不客气 (bù kèqi) — "you're welcome".
More formal than 不好意思 (bù hǎoyìsi).

column5: Qǐng gěi wǒ yì bēi shuǐ.
column6: Please give me a glass of water.

column7: 学 alone also means "to learn"; 习 implies practice.

column5: Tā shì wǒ de hǎo péngyou.

column7: 昨天 = yesterday, 明天 = tomorrow.
Followed by a verb or noun.

column6: I want to travel to China.
